indicators.name: Cabinets
indicators.rationale: Cabinets obstruct the view and access to the workspace.

indicators.name: Countertop
indicators.rationale: The countertop provides a flat surface for placing a computer and other items.

indicators.name: Floor
indicators.rationale: The dark flooring can make it difficult to see the computer screen.

reasoning_summary: The space is marginally adequate for computer work due to the obstruction caused by cabinets and the potential difficulty of seeing the computer screen on the dark flooring.
